posts.author: rk1771
posts.text: It appears that new units could not start in 2025-26. Older units were working on 100 percent capacity. Looks like a case of enough orders, which could not be executed due to manufacturing bottleneck. As new unit is coming up, cost etc has gone up leading to some erosion in margin. Let us see what the management says.

posts.author: ha_the_meow
posts.text: Abysmal results ENVIPO_29052026175952_Outcome_of_BM.pdf they missed their annual guidance by almost 50 percent, only 58cr annual revenue over 52cr in FY25. And margins are decreased as well without any rise in revenue. image 1766×585 230 KB They also said H2 heavy, i dont even know what to make of it
